narrative:
Marshall (precinct in Highland County) has 657 registered voters, with 50.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.6 percentage points.
